feed.title: App Store Discounts（HK）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:67474973430475776+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008141708743680+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 欢迎订阅 App Store Discounts
entry.summary: 感谢您订阅我们的 RSS 源，我们是一个致力于为全球用户带来 App Store 最新折扣信息的社区驱动项目。我们的目标是让每一位用户都能第一时间掌握心爱应用的优惠动态，无论是应用本身的价格下调，还是内购项目的限时促销，我们都将为您一网打尽！
entry.content:
感谢您订阅我们的 RSS 源，我们是一个致力于为全球用户带来 App Store 最新折扣信息的社区驱动项目。我们的目标是让每一位用户都能第一时间掌握心爱应用的优惠动态，无论是应用本身的价格下调，还是内购项目的限时促销，我们都将为您一网打尽！

关于我们的 RSS 源

  • 专注于推送 App Store 应用的优惠信息
  • 只要应用价格降低或内购项降价，我们就会及时推送
  • 每个应用的优惠信息以单独的 feed 形式呈现
  • RSS 源完全开源，您可以随时查看、贡献和添加您关注的应用

找到我们

App Store Discounts

最后

如果本项目对你有帮助，请帮我们点个 ⭐️ 可好

entry.title: 统计数据报告
entry.content:
追踪的国家或地区

  1. 中国大陆(CN)
  2. 中国香港(HK)
  3. 中国澳门(MO)
  4. 中国台湾(TW)
  5. 美国(US)
  6. 土耳其(TR)
  7. 葡萄牙(PT)

追踪的应用数量统计

类别 总应用 人为添加 自动添加 禁止推送
所有 1889 201 1688 81
HK 1767 179 1588 73

本月应用优惠次数排行(HK)

由于支持了根据付费应用排行榜自动添加追踪的应用，现目前大部分应用是自动添加的，应用的质量是未知不可控的，当前这个排行榜会作为后续禁用推送的一个参考
名次 应用 优惠次数
1 ROMAN: 進食計畫、減肥、減脂一體化。體重管理。

  • 价格：3

entry.title: Dwarf Fortress Remote
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 38.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ HK$ 38.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App 內購買

  • Server Subscription：HK$ 38.00

应用描述

Dwarf Fortress is a famous fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games. This app allows you to play Fortress Mode remotely on your mobile device. Dwarf Fortress is an open-ended fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games, which is in constant development since 2002. In Fortress mode, player indirectly controls a group of dwarves, attempting to construct a successful and wealthy fortress. The game features a highly detailed procedurally generated fantasy world with multiple civilizations and wildlife, realistic geology, weather effects. You will have dozens of different building and items to construct, hundreds of materials, advanced military system, agriculture, sieges and underground monsters, diplomacy and trading. ATTENTION: Internet connection is required to play. The original game with a plugin (both free) running at your home or on a cloud server will be required, visit mifki.com/df/setup for details. Alternatively, you can purchase a server subscription from within the app, in which case we will manage a server for you, visit mifki.com/df/subscription for details. Supported Dwarf Fortress version is 0.47.05. Visit bay12games.com/dwarves for full information about Dwarf Fortress. However, please report any issues with this application to mifki.com/df/support and NOT to the original game authors.

entry.title: Code Blue – CPR & ACLS Timer
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 32.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ HK$ 32.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

应用描述

Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters. Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes. Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow. # Core Features # DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS - Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals - High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded REAL-TIME EVENT LOG - Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions - Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING - Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality # Fully Customizable for Your Practice # CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES - Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS Configure the app as a simple CPR timer Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour # First Responder & Post-Code Tools # FIRST RESPONDER MODE - Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest - Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT - Save previous codes - Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review # Evidence-Based Flowcharts # ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES - Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts - Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines # Built for Healthcare Professionals # Designed for use in: - Emergency Departments - ICUs - Wards - Prehospital and first-responder settings Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation. # Support & Legal # For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact: Customer Support: suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy End User License Agreement (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

应用截屏

iPad

entry.title: Waterlogue: Photo to Painting
entry.content:
优惠信息

App 內購買

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：HK$ 228.00 → HK$ 188.00 [HK$ 148.00 ~ HK$ 228.00]

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App 內購買

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Monthly)：HK$ 32.00
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Yearly)：HK$ 88.00
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：HK$ 188.00

应用描述

You don’t need to paint to create beautiful watercolor images—Waterlogue captures the essence of your photos in brilliant, liquid color. See the world like an artist. FEATURES: • Create art that looks hand-painted • Photos become luminous watercolors in seconds • Expressive styles for portraits, landscapes, and more • Beautiful results for people and pets • Print-quality export for frameable art • Simulated watercolor, not AI • Private by design—your photos never leave your device • Customize borders, lightness, and detail ACCLAIM: • Over one million sold since 2013 • Awarded "App Store Best of 2014" by Apple • Featured as App Store App of the Day • Oprah's holiday pick! "Made with Love: DIY Gifts"—O, The Oprah Magazine • “…with Waterlogue, it’s clear that there’s a very thoughtful human touch behind the app’s painterly algorithms.” —WIRED • “…Waterlogue is going to utterly amaze you, as it’s the first app I’ve seen that gives results that really look like a watercolor painting.” —Cult of Mac • “Watercolor apps may not be a new idea, but Waterlogue does it in a gorgeous, intuitive way, and it’s quite a pleasure to use.” —AppAdvice.com • “It goes beyond typical Photoshop watercolor filters because it has more visual intelligence, and more of the feel of the real paint.” —James Gurney, Artist and Author of Dinotopia • From Tinrocket, creator of This by Tinrocket (App Store Best of 2016), Olli (App Store Best of 2017), and more KEEP UP WITH TINROCKET: • Follow @Tinrocket on Instagram for the latest! • We’re here to help: If you have a question or need assistance, you can always email us at support@tinrocket.com • If you like Waterlogue, please consider leaving an App Store review or rating. Every review counts and helps indie developers like ourselves. Waterlogue® and See the world like an artist® are registered trademarks of Tinrocket, LLC

entry.title: 首爾驅魔人1111: Roguelite
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 48.00 → HK$ 32.00 [HK$ 32.00 ~ HK$ 48.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 32.00

App 內購買

  • 200,000 x Coins：HK$ 88.00
  • 80,000 x Coins：HK$ 38.00
  • 40,000 x Coins：HK$ 22.00
  • 10,000 x Coins：HK$ 8.00

应用描述

果斷決策，攻擊快如閃電！作為最終的驅魔師，依照情況選擇攻擊方式、強化戰鬥牌組，並組合特性與道具——在死亡降臨之前拯救被詛咒的靈魂吧！ ▪ 即時回合制戰鬥 你做出決定的瞬間，敵人立即反應！每一步都充滿快速而緊張的動作。 ▪ 四位擁有獨特策略的角色 每位角色擁有8種獨特的攻擊方式、專屬動畫和2個被動特性。根據每次遊戲調整你的遊戲風格。 ▪ 時間限制 - 快速思考，更快出擊！ 每次遊戲中，你只有7分鐘來擊敗所有敵人。你為這一刻進行了殘酷的訓練。 ▪ 物品與特性組合 在戰鬥中自動激活的戰略協同。時機和適應能力是勝利的關鍵！ ▪ Roguelite 在一次遊戲中清除所有7個地圖和Boss，否則將被重置！但同一地圖通關3次將解鎖進度。收集金幣，構建更強大的卡組，再次挑戰！ ▪ 完全支援控制器 支援Xbox、DualShock/DualSense以及大多數xInput/Direct Input控制器。 ▪ 支援12種語言 支援韓語、英語、日語、中文（簡體/繁體）、法語、德語、義大利語、西班牙語、葡萄牙語、巴西葡萄牙語和俄語。 ▪ 離線遊戲 所有資料皆儲存在本機，不需連接網路。 注意- 移除應用程式將會刪除所有儲存資料。 ▪Discord https://discord.gg/UaZApdWG93 ▪聯絡信箱 / 錯誤回報 snowgames0629@gmail.com

entry.title: Dead Cells
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 68.00 → HK$ 32.00 [HK$ 32.00 ~ HK$ 68.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 32.00

App 內購買

  • The Bad Seed：HK$ 32.00
  • Fatal Falls：HK$ 32.00
  • The Queen and the Sea：HK$ 32.00
  • Return to Castlevania：HK$ 58.00

应用描述

Death is not the end. Play as a failed alchemic experiment and explore the sprawling, ever-changing castle to find out what happened on this gloomy island…! That is, assuming you’re able to fight your way past its keepers. Dead Cells is a roguevania action platformer that will require you to master frantic 2D combat with a wide variety of weapons and skills against merciless minions and boss. Kill. Die. Learn. Repeat. First available on PC and consoles, the indie hit Dead Cells is now slaying foes on mobile! Main Features • Roguevania: The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline-pumping threat of permadeath • Frantic and Dynamic 2D Action: Learn your enemies’ patterns to stay alive, or prepare to be sent back to your cell before you can say “baguette” • Nonlinear Progression: Unlock new levels with every death, opt for the path that suits your current build, your playstyle or just your mood. Surely, the ramparts can’t be as bad as the sewers, right? • Play at your own pace: Will you explore every nook and cranny of the castle, or rush to the end? *Latest updates are available: Clean Cut & The End is Near* RETURN TO CASTLEVANIA DLC Time for some vampire slaying • New storyline - overcome the Ruler of Darkness alongside Alucard and Richter Belmont, • 2 new biomes - Explore Dracula's Castle and its outskirts • 9 new monsters - Werewolves, haunted armors, and medusas are waiting for you • 14 new weapons - wield the Vampire Killer or the Holy Water to defeat creatures of the night, • 3 new bosses - go fangs to fangs against Death and Dracula himself • 20 new outfits - dress as your favorite Castlevania characters such as Simon and Richter Belmont or Alucard • Alternative soundtracks - play along 51 Castlevania original tracks and 12 tunes reimagined in the style of Dead Cells THE BAD SEED DLC You reap what you sow • New levels to lose your head in the not-so-peaceful Dilapidated Arboretum and the noxious Morass of the Banished • New monsters to rip to pieces: get to know the locals, such as the Jerkshroom and the Yeeter • New weapons to play with: trim sticking-out heads with the Scythe Claw, or make them dance to the sound of the Rhythm n' Bouzouki • New boss to fight against: Mama Tick is dying to meet you FATAL FALLS DLC Ready for a leap of faith? • 3 new biomes - Get some fresh air at the Fractured Shrines, splash around at the Undying Shores and take a picture at the Mausoleum • 8 new monsters - The Cold Blooded Guardians and their friends would love to teach you about their culture. ... Wait, aren't those relatives of yours in the Undying Shores...? • 7 new weapons - Lil' Serenade is perfect for breaking the ice with the locals, although the Snake Fangs would make for a perfect souvenir... • 1 new boss - The Scarecrow is very proud of his gardening skills and won't hesitate to show off QUEEN AND THE SEA DLC Take it to the sea! • 2 new biomes - Battle your way through a rotten shipwreck, or scale a burning lighthouse and confront your deadliest foe yet. • 9 new weapons, including a throwable shark, a trident and a pirate hook hand (eyepatch not included). • 2 new bosses - Don't lose your head before you meet the Queen! This DLC also gives you the usual extras: - A not-so-cute pet. - Loads of new outfits. - New enemies to bash. WARNING: Devices with less than 2 Gb of RAM may not be able to run this content correctly. We recommend not to take this DLC if your device is under 2gb of RAM. Carefully redesigned for mobile with a revamped interface • Two game modes available: Original & Auto-Hit • Custom controls & More touch controls options available: Change the buttons’ position and size to your liking, swipe to dodge… • MFi external controller support • No ads, no F2P mechanics! If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com with as much information as possible on the issue.

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Knight & Dragon III
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 18.00 → HK$ 2.00 [HK$ 2.00 ~ HK$ 32.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 2.00

应用描述

稀有物品！ 轉職！ 以及宏大的故事。 極致成就要素滿滿的正統砍殺類RPG遊戲“Knight & Dragon”第三彈！ 《Knight & Dragon III》是基於中世紀奇幻世界觀構建的砍殺類RPG遊戲的第三彈。 故事始於某天早晨，你從突然到訪的老紳士那裏收到了正式公會成員證書，前往格林加爾德共和國的小村莊赴任。 共和國中發生的各種事件、與鄰國林達爾帝國的紛爭、騎士與龍的故事，最終都將成為圍繞星辰的宏大命運旋渦，將你卷入其中。 【Knight & Dragon III的特點】 ▽沿襲前作的極致成就型RPG的基本係統，如白熱化的實時戰鬥、稀有物品掉落和轉職等！ ▽實時戰鬥的互動性更強，可以判斷對手的攻擊時機，進行閃避、格擋、反擊等！ ▽新增了豐富的武器類物品，如斧頭、長槍、戟等！ 還可以創建自己喜歡的角色，如雙手持武器或二刀流等！ ▽新增的世界地圖為宏大的故事增添色彩！ 故事篇幅超越前作，同時保留了通關後內容！ ▽此外，在本作中，通過各具特點的豐富NPC登場，以及地名、街市名稱等專有名詞，描繪了宏大的故事！ ▽另外，遊戲當然也延續了前作中備受好評的功能，如隊伍派遣、人格面具功能等！ ・・・ 如您想在購買前體驗遊戲氛圍，前作《ナイト・アンド・ドラゴン：王国の騎士》可以免費遊玩，請務必試玩一下。 官方網站 http://dgjam.com/knightdragon3

应用截屏

iPhone

entry.title: 大提琴調音器專業版 - Cello Tuner Pro
entry.id: 大提琴調音器專業版 - Cello Tuner Pro-hk-1774802658298
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 88.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ HK$ 88.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App 內購買

  • 音叉：HK$ 32.00
  • 設置：HK$ 32.00

应用描述

容易地及準確地調整大提琴的音色 · 校準: A392Hz, A415Hz, A432Hz, A440Hz, A441Hz, A442Hz, A443Hz, A444Hz, A466Hz. · 準確 – 以Hz顯示頻率 · 唯一一個適用於64位元的調音器 · 泛用性高 – 支援iPod touch, iPhone及iPad · 立即載入並提供快速的調音 · 最高的反應度 · 恆常的更新 · 視覺上的指標 – 已調音的弦會發亮 · 為Retina顯示屏而優化 · 直覺上的用家介面和LED調音顯示指標 --- 重要通告：iOS7已經開放了在隱私設定裡加上麥克風存取的功能。當這程式發出提示的時候，請記得允許麥克風存取的設定。你可以在設定 -> 隱私 -> 麥克風裡檢查到。謝謝 --- 有任何意見？問題？ 請把任何意見透過我們的網頁或者feedback@daikyoujulabs.com傳給我們

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Card.Note - 多彩卡片笔记
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 8.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ HK$ 8.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App 內購買

  • Card.Note Premiun：HK$ 18.00

应用描述

Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ； 你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。 你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒； 还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。 「Card.Note」九大特点： 1.极简设计 循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。 2.文青定制 精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。 3.全局卡片化 充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。 4.全局手势化 下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。 5.语音录入 打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。 6.要事提醒： 可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。 7.快捷高效 支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。 8.iCloud云同步 支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。 9.深色模式 全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。 感谢下载，生活愉快。 如有问题或建议，请联系开发者 微博：土味文艺开发者 邮箱：yande18@126.com

应用截屏

iPad

entry.title: Art of Rally
entry.summary:
价格: HK$ 58.00 → HK$ 18.00
art of rally: australia dlc: HK$ 18.00 → HK$ 8.00
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 58.00 → HK$ 18.00 [HK$ 18.00 ~ HK$ 58.00]）

App 內購買

  • art of rally: australia dlc：HK$ 18.00 → HK$ 8.00 [HK$ 8.00 ~ HK$ 18.00]

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 18.00

App 內購買

  • art of rally: australia dlc：HK$ 8.00

应用描述

Race across the world through colorful and stylized environments in top-down view. Compete for first place in the leaderboards with daily and weekly challenges. Will you master the art of rally? Experience the golden era of rally in Career mode, traveling across 78 stages from Finland to Sardinia, Norway, Japan, Germany, Kenya and Indonesia. Get behind the wheel of your favorite vintage cars, ranging from the 60’s to the 80’s, Group B, Group S and Group A. From beginner-friendly options to driving modes that’ll challenge the most expert drivers, all players can tackle the races using their favorite rally driving tricks: Scandinavian flick, counter steering, left foot braking, handbrake turns. Get your name out at the top of the Leaderboard in our daily and weekly challenges. Show off your driving skills, or simply your favourite landscapes, with the integrated Photo and Replay mode.

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 夢幻怪獸
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 8.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ HK$ 8.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App 內購買

  • 13 Gems：HK$ 58.00
  • 6 Gems：HK$ 32.00
  • 48 Gems：HK$ 228.00
  • 150 Gems：HK$ 588.00
  • 1 Gem：HK$ 8.00
  • 74 Gems：HK$ 328.00
  • 28 Gems：HK$ 118.00
  • 119 Gems：HK$ 488.00

应用描述

收服和養成超過2000隻以上的精美動畫後製完怪獸，成為傳說中的訓練師！並和世界各地的玩家PvP對戰！ 收服、訓練和養成超過2000隻怪獸，打造專屬於你的隊伍通往勝利之路！超大型的怪物對戰RPG手遊！ 夢幻怪獸是一款讓人欲罷不能的RPG手遊，主打四對四特殊回合制戰鬥，最多16隻怪獸組成一個隊伍。獨創對戰系統和上百種技能讓每一次戰鬥更加熱血和多元。終極進化你的怪獸，釋放它們的真正力量，主宰PvP賽場！您準備好進入夢幻怪獸的世界了嗎？ ▶遊戲特點: ● 收集怪獸 • 捕捉和養成1000隻以上的精美動畫後製怪獸！ • 完成終極進化，釋放真正潛能。 • 收集特殊素材，解放秘密技能！ ● 打造隊伍 • 用16隻怪獸，研發終極隊伍。 • 特殊回合制戰鬥，擊敗你的宿敵！ • 超過100種怪獸技能，打出致命Combo！ ● 成為傳奇 • 征服六個聯盟、挑戰至上四強。超過60個小時的冒險故事！ • 探索六座島嶼和無數地下城！ • 隨著劇情，揭發隱藏在百年帝國維羅希亞華麗外表下的黑歷史。 ● Online對戰 • 和來自世界各地的玩家PvP對戰！ • 超過100支線上任務。 • 參加每週特殊活動，贏得更多豐富獎勵！ • 本遊戲內容涉及「性」、「暴力」，故建議應列級別為「輔導15歲級」。 • 本遊戲內有提供購買虛擬貨幣、物品等付費服務。 • 注意使用時間，避免沉迷於遊戲。 官方臉書: https://www.facebook.com/NeoMonstersOfficial/ 官方論壇(英文): http://www.neomonstersforum.com/ 官方客服郵箱: neomonsupport.gameplay@zigzagame.net 服務條款: https://www.zigzagame.com/terms/ 隱私政策: https://www.zigzagame.com/Privacy-Policy/

entry.title: 伤寒论条阅
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 8.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ HK$ 8.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

应用描述

- 按条文编号查找 - 按条文内容查找 - 按方剂名称查找 - 按方剂组成查找 - 收藏重点条目和方剂 - 笔记功能 - 复制条文 - 简体 繁体切换 本App仅供中医爱好者和从业者学习参考使用，具体使用谨遵明医。 内容校订需要精力和时间，如有遗漏欢迎留言评论。

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad
